MINI MINUTES: Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Anthony Terry.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Anthony Miller is present.
Attorney Jinnhua Su representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
